title: Nostalgia Items
description: Removes Modern recipes and reverts back to old names!
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

Hate other types of wood, beds and more? Miss the old "reeds"? This mod brings back the original recipes and names from Beta 1.7.3, removing variants of signs, slabs, stairs, doors, etc and replacing them with oak. And, it brings back the old names of various items, like the "Rose", simply "Beds" and more.

## Note
I will not be adding Forge support.
